title: Voxel decision aggregation join fix at voxels.routes.ts:858 (PR 1.2 of URO Tier 1 Round 1) — SUPERSEDED PRE-EXECUTION
description: [v1.0.1 SUPERSEDE AMENDMENT 2026-06-09] This 2026-06-09 spec is redundant — work already landed by d-2026-06-08-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix at EB PR #316 / merge SHA c32c7b14 / 2026-06-08. Retired pre-execution per Stage 4 substrate-read DISPATCH-EB-READ-voxel-aggregation-substrate-2026-06-09 (run at EB main b9b4141511f806b6746cc8bba0192253b3c06793 2026-06-09): pm_decisions/primary_voxel_urn canonical join is already present at voxels.routes.ts lines 881, 942, 1062; FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1 closure block names PR #316 / c32c7b14; DEC d-2026-06-08-aggregation-via-primary-voxel-urn-join already approved in decision-log; .dlp/deliverables/d-2026-06-08-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix/SPEC.md exists. Substrate-before-write SKILL caught this redundancy at Stage 4 entry, prior to any EB write. lifecycleState advances S4-authored -> superseded. No execution tarball authored. [Original v1.0.0 description retained below for audit:] Fix the decision aggregation query at apps/api-gateway/src/routes/voxels.routes.ts:858 so it correctly joins pm_decisions.primary_voxel_urn against voxels.urn now that both columns carry canonical type-first URN form per PR 1.1 (d-2026-06-06-eb-urn-namespace-reconcile merged at EB f81f7b6 2026-06-06). Aggregation currently returns decisionCount=0 for Maple Ridge data (known state per PR 1.1 OUT-5 postMerge note); this PR makes it return correct counts. Closes the aggregation half of substrate-corrected FU-EB-VOXELIZER-LEVEL-EXTRACTION-FIX-1. Files new FU for Maple Ridge IFC source storey-name cleanup as Arc 2 scope per PR 1.1 OUT-3 framing.

notes:
v1.0.1 SUPERSEDE AMENDMENT 2026-06-09. This spec is retired pre-execution per memory rule #20 enterprise-complete + memory rule #1 TRUTH ONLY. Successor (chronologically-earlier landed deliverable): d-2026-06-08-eb-voxel-decision-aggregation-fix at EB PR #316 / c32c7b14 / 2026-06-08. Causal chain: (1) memory #22 critical-path framing carried PR 1.2 as [NEXT] from strategy doc 2026-06-07 §13; (2) PR 1.2 landed 2026-06-08 between strategy doc authoring and 2026-06-09 cold-start of this session — memory + strategy doc not updated; (3) cold-start prompt + L4 amendment 'proceed' both predicated on stale framing; (4) substrate-before-write SKILL Stage 4 substrate-read dispatch caught the redundancy at the spec authoring boundary, prior to any EB-side write. Failure averted: zero EB writes, zero merge churn, zero NO-OP execution. Cost incurred: one redundant SR PR (#165) landing a spec that never executes — accepted as the price of substrate-before-write discipline working at the boundary where it was supposed to. Recent substrate learnings to fold into ops: (a) cold-start critical-path verification must read FU closure blocks (resolution.commitSha + prUrl) via raw register inspection, not eb-agent query-followups summary shape which omits closure data (memory #13 SUBSTRATE-CORRECTION case — surface as new FU for ops doctrine update); (b) strategy doc [NEXT] markers are dated; require live FU register cross-check at each session open; (c) sibling deliverables under same parent arc with overlapping intent need a canonical lookup against parentDeliverable's childDeliverables[] before authoring a new sibling (currently parentDeliverable references but childDeliverables on the parent may not be back-populated — surface for SR-side schema discipline review). Memory hygiene relay to SR: memory #22 critical path needs PR 1.2 marked [CLOSED at EB c32c7b14 PR #316 2026-06-08]; per memory #4, memory edits require explicit L4 named-step. Process residue captured here; no separate FU filed for the supersede itself (the schema transition + this notes block are the canonical audit).

Enterprise Excellence. Schema-First. No Shortcuts.
